things.name: Adalaj Stepwell (Vav)
things.description: Exquisitely carved 15th-century stepwell - one of Gujarat's greatest treasures

things.name: Sabarmati Ashram (Gandhi's Ashram)
things.description: Gandhi's home from 1917-1930 - where he launched the Salt March to Dandi

things.name: Old City Pols & Heritage Walk
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage medieval walled city with carved wooden havelis

things.name: Sidi Saiyyed Mosque
things.description: 1572 mosque with the most intricate stone jaali latticework - the Tree of Life

things.name: Rann of Kutch (Salt Desert)
things.description: World's largest salt desert - spectacular full moon Rann Utsav festival

things.name: CEPT University Architecture
things.description: Campus designed by Balkrishna Doshi - India's finest modernist architect

things.name: Calico Museum of Textiles
things.description: World's finest collection of Indian textiles from the Mughal era

things.name: Rani no Hajiro (Queen's Tomb)
things.description: Tombs of Mughal queens with superb carved stone screens

things.name: Vishala Village Museum Restaurant
things.description: Dinner in a recreated Gujarati village with folk performances and thali dining

things.name: Gujarati Thali
things.description: India's most elaborate meal - 20+ small dishes covering sweet, sour, spicy and savoury
